allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'count={d[\\"count\\"]}'\); s=d['standings']; print\('first item keys:', list\(s[0].keys\(\)\) if s else 'EMPTY'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'count={d[\\"count\\"]}'\); s=d['scorers']; print\('first item keys:', list\(s[0].keys\(\)\) if s else 'EMPTY'\); print\('player.name:', s[0].get\('player',{}\).get\('name'\) if s else 'N/A'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([l['name'] for l in d['leagues']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\), 'count:', d.get\('count'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\), 'count:', d.get\('count'\)\); print\('first row:', d['data'][0] if d.get\('data'\) else 'EMPTY'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['count']\); s=d['standings']; print\('rank/team/pts:', s[0].get\('rank'\), s[0].get\('team',{}\).get\('name'\), s[0].get\('points'\)\) if s else print\('EMPTY'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\), 'count:', d.get\('count'\)\); print\('data keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r\) for r in d.get\('data',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['count']\); print\('1st:', d['standings'][0].get\('rank'\), d['standings'][0].get\('team',{}\).get\('name'\), d['standings'][0].get\('points'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['count']\); print\('1st:', d['scorers'][0].get\('player',{}\).get\('name'\), d['scorers'][0].get\('statistics',[{}]\)[0].get\('goals',{}\).get\('total'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d['success'], 'count:', d['count']\); print\('1st:', d['data'][0] if d['data'] else 'EMPTY'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['count']\); print\('1st player:', d['scorers'][0].get\('player',{}\).get\('name'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d['success'], 'count:', d['count']\)")
